evals.prompt: Run /specify for JIRA-123. Generate the development spec from the Jira issue.
evals.expected_output: Agent gets issue, generates spec-{issue_key}.md with required sections, adds bot-cx-ai-spec label, performs Jira transitions.

evals.prompt: Create a spec for Jira ticket JIRA-123. I need the spec document in /analysis/.
evals.expected_output: Agent follows specify-workflow: get issue, generate spec with User Stories, FRs, Security Vibe Check, Success Criteria.

evals.prompt: The Jira issue JIRA-123 needs to be specified. Run the specify workflow.
evals.expected_output: Agent executes steps 0-3 sequentially, outputs spec-JIRA-123.md with Target Modules, User Scenarios, Functional Requirements.
